prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Lighting controls & emergency egress, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: emergency fixture on switched leg. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: NEC 700, NFPA 101.
title: Compliance check: Lighting controls & emergency egress (commercial project)
